data.title: Newegg Business partners with Credit Key to offer flexible financing up to 12 months for IT and electronics solutions.
data.description: In Diamond Bar, California, Newegg Business, a segment of Newegg Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEGG), a prominent supplier of IT, computer hardware, and electronics solutions, revealed a fresh collaboration with Credit Key, a top B2B financing company. This partnership enables businesses to promptly acquire necessary technology with payment flexibility ranging from Net 30 to extended terms up to twelve months. This aims to aid in fostering growth and financial steadiness.

data.title: Innerspace Counseling in Old Bridge, NJ appoints Ira Hays, LCSW, as Director of Clinical Services, with over 20 years of experience.
data.description: In Old Bridge, New Jersey, on October 17, 2025, Innerspace Counseling has revealed a new partnership aimed at boosting mental health service expansion and growth. The organization is delighted to welcome Ira Hays, LCSW, with over 20 years of clinical experience, as the Director of Clinical Services. This move signifies a strategic step towards enhancing mental health care provision in the area.
UBS Global Wealth Management increased its 2025 year-end target for the S&P 500 Index to 6900 from 6600.

data.title: Identify market manipulation in altcoins pre-crash by recognizing organized actions that artificially impact coin prices and deceive traders.
data.description: There have been reports of organized activities in the crypto market aimed at manipulating altcoin prices and deceiving traders regarding their actual worth. These efforts involve artificial movements to influence prices, impacting the value of various cryptocurrencies significantly.

data.title: Metallus (NYSE: MTUS) announces Q3 2025 earnings webcast details on Nov 6 after market close in Canton, Ohio.
data.description: A highly reputable company specializing in specialty metals, manufactured components, and supply chain solutions, Metallus (NYSE: MTUS), based in Canton, Ohio, is set to announce its third-quarter financial results for 2025 on Thursday, November 6. The report will be issued after the close of the market on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Simplilearn makes 2026 GSV 150 list as one of top growth companies in digital learning.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, on October 17, 2025, Simplilearn, a prominent international platform for digital skills training, has been selected for the 2026 GSV 150 list. This acknowledgment represents a significant achievement for the company, positioning it among the most innovative global companies focused on enhancing digital learning and workforce skills. Simplilearn's inclusion in this list highlights its influence and success in transforming the education and professional development landscape.

data.title: VEVOR launches Hybrid Heat Press, making professional customization accessible to DIY creators worldwide.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, VEVOR, a prominent home improvement company, unveiled its latest product, the Hybrid Heat Press. This innovative heat transfer machine is tailored for aspiring creators and DIY enthusiasts, aiming to provide them with the ability to achieve professional-level customizations. By introducing this patented technology, VEVOR seeks to empower individuals worldwide with the tools for high-quality personalization in their projects.

data.title: Global ultrasonic cleaner market to reach $2.13 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 6.66%. Intense competition among top players like Emerson Electric, Crest Ultrasonics, SharperTek.
data.description: In Dublin, a recent market research report on ultrasonic cleaners from 2025 to 2030 has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report suggests that the global ultrasonic cleaning market is projected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.66% between 2024 and 2030. This market is seeing steady growth and features a diversified landscape characterized by a mix of global industry leaders and medium-sized technology companies. This diversity contributes to intense competition within the market. Key players in this market segment include Emerson Electric, Crest Ultrasonics, and SharperTek.

data.title: Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) declares Q4 2025 dividend of $0.22 per Class A share.
data.description: On October 17, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) announced that their board of directors has given the green light for a dividend payout for the fourth quarter of 2025. Shareholders holding Class A ordinary shares will receive $0.22 per share as dividend payment.

data.title: Evaxion's EVX-01 cancer vaccine shows 75% Objective Response Rate in phase 2 trial. 🩺🔬 #AI #Evaxion #CancerVaccine
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on October 17, 2025, Evaxion A/S (NASDAQ: EVAX) revealed significant findings regarding its personalized cancer vaccine EVX-01 in a press release. The clinical-stage TechBio company focused on AI-Immunology™ reported unprecedented two-year clinical efficacy data. The results are particularly promising for patients dealing with advanced melanoma.

data.title: Dream Exchange CEO Joe Cecala to host webinar on report "Breaking the Cycle of Structural Oppression in Capital Markets". Oct. 17, 2025.
data.description: A recent session in Chicago on October 17, 2025, discussed the findings from the report "Breaking the Cycle of Structural Oppression in Capital Markets." The webinar will be hosted by Joe Cecala, CEO and Founder of Dream Exchange, to delve deeper into the organization's research. This report sheds light on important insights regarding structural oppression within capital markets. The session aimed to address and analyze this issue, emphasizing the significance of understanding and dismantling such systemic barriers. The discussion in the webinar will further explore the key points and recommendations highlighted in the report. Stay tuned for more insights and solutions from this important initiative.

data.title: MDA Space (TSX: MDA) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 14, 2025; key info disclosed before market open.
data.description: Brampton-based MDA Space Ltd. (TSX: MDA) has revealed its plans to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on Friday, November 14, 2025, before the market opens. As a key player in the global space sector, MDA Space Ltd. is a reputable mission partner. This announcement showcases the company's commitment to transparency and keeping stakeholders informed about its financial performance. The quarterly report is eagerly anticipated by investors and industry analysts looking to assess the company's growth and position in the market.

data.title: Mainscape prioritizes employees in growth strategy shift to employee-centered model. CEO Forsythe emphasizes vision.
data.description: In Fishers, Indiana on October 17, 2025, Mainscape, a leading landscape maintenance company in the country, is prioritizing its employees in its expansion plan as it shifts towards an employee-centric approach. CEO Mark Forsythe highlights that this shift signifies...
